name: dcness
description: Lightweight governance harness — prose-only determinism (no meta-LLM) + enforced work-order and access boundaries.

metadata.description: dcNess — prose-only 결정론(메타 LLM 호출 0) + 작업 순서·접근 영역 강제. release 브랜치 배포 (docs/internal/ · docs/archive/ 미포함).

plugins.name: dcness
